bpWarnings.message: Table ConDemoCtrlNote does not have an alternate key

root_cause_hypothesis: PRIMARY RESULT: the form design-root regression is FIXED. PR #728 (FormAuthoringDefaults.IsDesignRootSentinel) is live and effective: a form created with a data source and an EMPTY design accepted its FIRST top-level control via d365fo_file(action=modify, operation=add-control, parentControl="Design"). All 5 add-control ops succeeded via IMetaFormProvider.Update (HeaderGroup Group under Design; MainGrid Grid under Design with controlDataSource bound at add time; NoteId + Subject String columns inside MainGrid bound via controlDataSource/controlDataField). This inverts the recorded baseline of 6/6 add-control failures. NO overwrite=true/xmlContent escape hatch was used anywhere; build is clean (xppc 0 errors) and the golden matches. RESIDUAL DEFECTS (non-blocking, all pre-existing and independent of #728): (1) add-index SILENTLY DROPS the allowDuplicates and alternateKey params - both were passed, the op returned success, and neither <AllowDuplicates> nor <AlternateKey> appears in the emitted XML, so a unique/alternate-key index cannot be expressed through the grounded path and BPCheckAlternateKeyAbsent is unfixable; it also cannot update an existing index (errors "already exists"), forcing remove-index + add-index. (2) modify-property rejects FormRef ("Unknown AxTable property FormRef"); supported list has no FormRef, so BPErrorTableMissingFormRef is unfixable via the grounded path. (3) The labels tool advertises legacy SYS labels as "@SYS:@SYS71455"; xppbp rejects that with BPErrorLabelIsText - the correct metadata form is "@SYS71455". This independently reproduces defect (6) from the 2026-07-21 L4-master-security-slice run and cost one build cycle. (4) prepare(mode=create) reported a name collision for ConDemoCtrlNote from a STALE symbol-index entry - the table did not exist on disk (residue of an earlier rolled-back run that de-indexed nothing). The 2 remaining bp warnings are scope-inherent for this case anyway: a FormRef needs a display menu item, which is outside the case target_artifact_types [AxTable, AxForm].
suggested_fix_area: src/bridge MetadataWriteService add-index: honour allowDuplicates/alternateKey (currently accepted and discarded) and support updating an existing index instead of erroring; add FormRef (and other ref properties) to the AxTable modify-property allow-list; labels tool: emit legacy SYS labels in metadata-valid form (@SYS71455, not @SYS:@SYS71455); rollback/undo path: de-index symbols when a created object is removed so prepare() stops reporting phantom collisions.
